step_rationale: CAD and MI susceptibility locus; likely involved in lipid metabolism and atherosclerosis initiation.
mechanism: CELSR2 genetic variants regulate lipid retention and atherogenic lipoprotein handling, driving atherosclerotic lesion formation.

references.title: Shared Genetic Liability Between Heart Failure and Myocardial Infarction Revealed by Genome-Wide Cross-Trait Analysis.
references.journal: Journal of cardiovascular pharmacology and therapeutics

references.title: From genotype to phenotype in human atherosclerosis--recent findings.
Mapping the genetic architecture of gene expression in human liver.
